context: Tests whether the agent correctly structures a Klaviyo flow with a metric trigger, time-delay action using the correct timezone setting, send-email action with all required fields, and correct flow/email status.

checklist.name: Metric trigger type
checklist.description: The flow trigger uses type 'metric' (since it's triggered by the Placed Order event, not a list or segment)

checklist.name: time-delay timezone: profile
checklist.description: The time-delay action's data contains timezone: 'profile' (not a hard-coded timezone like 'US/Eastern' or UTC)

checklist.name: time-delay 10 days
checklist.description: The time-delay action specifies a delay of 10 days (value: 10, unit: 'days')

checklist.name: template_id in data.message
checklist.description: The send-email action places template_id inside data.message.template_id, not at data.template_id

checklist.name: from_email required field
checklist.description: The send-email action includes from_email inside data.message

checklist.name: subject_line required field
checklist.description: The send-email action includes subject_line inside data.message (not empty or omitted)

checklist.name: Email action status draft
checklist.description: The send-email action's data includes status: 'draft'

checklist.name: API revision 2025-04-15
checklist.description: The script uses revision '2025-04-15' in the API headers

checklist.name: Rate limit / 429 handling
checklist.description: The script handles 429 rate-limit responses with a retry or backoff mechanism
